AboutEducationExperienceResearch

Experience

You can view my full resume here.

Verizon

Software Engineering Intern, Select / 5G Internet Team
Summer 2024

At Verizon, I helped build a backend system for a real-time map interface supporting the company’s 5G-based residential internet rollout. This platform surfaced live metrics, visualized infrastructure topologies, and surfaced actionable insights for performance engineers. I developed low-latency APIs and optimized SQL queries over normalized Postgres schemas with over 2 million rows. In parallel, I reengineered a high-cost site failure ML predictor, replacing it with an XGBoost model that halved inference time. My work shipped to production and contributed to a 20% reduction in mean time to resolution (MTTR), all while actively participating in Agile practices and sprint retrospectives.

Skills: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, SQL, XGBoost, Docker, GitHub Actions, Agile, Data Visualization

Stealth Startup

Data Engineer 2024

As the ninth employee at a stealth-stage startup focused on disinformation detection, I built and scaled a distributed data platform that doubled the company’s data holdings. My role spanned backend engineering and applied NLP: I deployed real-time data pipelines in Apache Flink, indexed insights into an Elasticsearch instance, and designed custom dashboards using Kibana to expose patterns to downstream ML models. I also worked in a forward-deployed capacity, implementing client-facing product features that directly supported revenue-driving use cases.

Skills: Apache Flink, Elasticsearch, Kibana, Python, NLP, Docker, Bash, Systems Integration

Pfizer

Data Science Intern, Digital Manufacturing

2023

At Pfizer, I worked at the intersection of data science and biomanufacturing, where I analyzed Neo4J-based graph data representing the COVID-19 vaccine supply chain. My work included PCA, feature engineering, and training a graph neural network (GNN) to detect manufacturing bottlenecks with 92% accuracy. I deployed the model to support operational decisions and regularly presented findings to senior stakeholders, informing capacity planning at Pfizer’s Irish production facilities.

Skills: Python, PyTorch Geometric, Neo4J, Graph Neural Networks, PCA, Feature Engineering, Data Storytelling
